flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Whatcom Community College fell 34% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6k → 2.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Whatcom Community College fell 89% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.4%).
